Name: UNavLinkCustomComponent
Description:
Encapsulates NavLinkCustomInterface interface, can be used with Actors not relevant for navigation
   
   Additional functionality:
   - can be toggled
   - can create obstacle area for easierforced separation of link end points
   - can broadcast state changes to nearby agents

Variables.Name: NavLinkUserId
Variables.Description: link Id assigned by navigation system

Variables.Name: EnabledAreaClass
Variables.Description: area class to use when link is enabled

Variables.Name: DisabledAreaClass
Variables.Description: area class to use when link is disabled

Variables.Name: bLinkEnabled
Variables.Description: is link currently in enabled state? (area class)

Variables.Name: bNotifyWhenEnabled
Variables.Description: should link notify nearby agents when it changes state to enabled

Variables.Name: bNotifyWhenDisabled
Variables.Description: should link notify nearby agents when it changes state to disabled

Variables.Name: bCreateBoxObstacle
Variables.Description: if set, box obstacle area will be added to generation

Variables.Name: ObstacleAreaClass
Variables.Description: area class for simple box obstacle

Variables.Name: BroadcastInterval
Variables.Description: interval for state change broadcast (0 = single broadcast)

Variables.Name: BroadcastChannel
Variables.Description: trace channel for state change broadcast
